title: Essex EEG Movie Memory dataset
description: This dataset comprises raw electroencephalography (EEG) recordings from 27 participants viewing 10-second movie clips previously watched by the subjects. Participants provided recognition judgments and memory assessments for each clip, with recognized or remembered clips presented a second time to capture temporal annotations of recognition moments. The dataset enables investigation of neural correlates of movie recognition and memory retrieval processes.
methods_description: EEG data were acquired using a BioSemi ActiveTwo system with 64 electrodes positioned according to the international 10-20 system at a sampling rate of 2048 Hz. Participants viewed movie clips and provided behavioral responses regarding recognition and memory, with temporal annotations captured via mouse click for recognized stimuli.
